replies.subject: Re: A European angle on your The Superrich Aren’t Just Buying Mansions—They Want the Enti piece
replies.body:
Hi Lisa,
Thanks for the follow up. I would be interested in the underlying data if
you can point me in the right direction.
Thanks, EB

On Wed, Jul 22, 2026 at 2:11 AM Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> wrote:

> Hello, Wanted to flag this in case my note last week slipped through. One
> data point that might be useful for a follow-up: LA County permits for
> noncombustible residential construction have risen sharply since 2025 — the
> line is genuinely starting
> 
>
> Hello,
>
> Wanted to flag this in case my note last week slipped through. One
> data point that might be useful for a follow-up: LA County permits for
> noncombustible residential construction have risen sharply since 2025
> — the line is genuinely starting to bend. Happy to share the
> underlying data if useful for an upcoming piece.
>
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Teaminfo@myvilla.la · https://urldefense.com/v3/__http://myvilla.la__;!!F0Stn7g!HiM3j9pbSLY1TrW0kghSuMUtv9tLY_71bN9hJW1fJTcP9h59FKLzWXfR1DJx3QCamSaxfYWG0TZc0No$
>
>
